title: §0Sexy Luigi (With Lyrics)
lines: His biceps could crush the stars!
His pecs, they have won our hearts!
And His physique all the same!
The fruit of His labor's plan
He'll cleanse us of all our sins
Praise be to his wondrous, thunderous thighs!
Luigi, I just wanna touch you
And you've got me in a trance
So Bowser doesn't stand a chance
